summary: Iter7 full functional re-test after main agent's Postgres+Redis supervisor fix. BACKEND: 20/20 PASSED on /app/backend/tests/test_iter6_full_smoke.py against external URL (auth signup+login, /users/me, market indices/quote/candles/search, portfolio/positions/funds invariants source=none + no_live_data=true, orders, alerts CRUD with pause/resume, notifications, news feed + impact, sentiment, strategy generate+list, opportunities, ai-models CRUD). FRONTEND: login (demo@tradeai.com / Demo1234!) redirects to /dashboard, topbar shows 'demo_trader / demo@tradeai.com', all 12 sidebar routes navigate (Dashboard, Markets, Watchlist, Trading Opportunities, Orders, Positions, Portfolio, Alerts & News, Strategies, AI Assistant, AI Models, Broker Settings) — zero 404s. Portfolio/Positions/Funds show empty-state (₹0.00 + 'No holdings found' / 'No live data available') with ZERO occurrences of the forbidden fake numbers 1,284,500 / 8,240 / 42,180. Trading Opportunities table renders all required columns (SYMBOL/LTP/VOLUME/RSI/MACD/RISK/CONF[idence]) plus extras. AI Models page shows 9-provider grid (OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini/OpenRouter/Groq/DeepSeek/Mistral/Perplexity/Ollama) with Primary&Fallback chain UI. Alerts & News renders feed + Impact tab. Two non-blocking console issues observed (see below).

ui_bugs.issue: React hydration warning: '<button> cannot be a descendant of <button>'. SentimentBadge renders a <button> that is itself nested inside another <button> element. Functional but produces a hydration warning on every page that displays sentiment.
ui_bugs.selector: SentimentBadge (likely on dashboard MarketMood / opportunities table)

ui_bugs.issue: Portfolio page subtitle says 'Showing real portfolio data from Angel One ()' even when broker is disconnected. The empty-state itself is correct (₹0.00 + 'No holdings found') but the green success banner + 'Live data from Angel One' label is misleading when no broker is connected. The topbar correctly shows 'Disconnected'.

integration_issues.issue: Two unhandled page errors: 'Invalid language tag: en-US@posix'. Some code path (likely Intl.NumberFormat or date-fns) is being called with the raw POSIX locale string instead of normalising to 'en-US'. Not blocking but emits a runtime exception during navigation.

action_items: Fix SentimentBadge nested-button hydration warning (use a <span role='button'> or restructure so the badge is not inside a parent <button>).
Normalise locale before passing to Intl APIs: strip '@posix' suffix or default to 'en-US' when navigator.language returns 'en-US@posix'. Currently throws 'Invalid language tag' page error.

Portfolio page: when broker is disconnected, do NOT show the green 'Showing real portfolio data from Angel One ()' banner with empty parentheses; show 'Broker not connected' instead so the user isn't told fake data is 'live'.
critical_code_review_comments: Postgres + Redis are now both supervisor-managed (/etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord_datastores.conf) — iter6 single point of failure is fully resolved. supervisorctl status confirms postgresql + redis + backend + frontend + mongodb + nginx-code-proxy all RUNNING.

Phase-2 'no fake data' invariant holds end-to-end: backend returns source='none' + no_live_data=true, frontend renders ₹0.00 / 'No holdings found' / '—'. None of the forbidden numbers 1,284,500 / 8,240 / 42,180 appear anywhere in the UI.
Backend test_iter6_full_smoke.py covers 20 endpoints in 12.4s and is a strong regression suite to keep running going forward.
Minor: Portfolio page copy assumes Angel One is connected even when it isn't — UX nit, not a contract bug.
Minor: SentimentBadge nested-button is a real DOM-validity issue and should be fixed to keep React strict-mode + accessibility clean.

success_rate.frontend: 95% — all 12 routes load, login works, empty-states correct, only 2 minor console warnings

seed_data_creation: 1 throwaway signup user created via /api/v1/auth/signup during pytest run (smoke_<hex>@test.com); 1 ai-models config created+deleted in-test. No persistent test data left.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter7 confirms iter6 blocker (Postgres down) is fully resolved by main agent's supervisor fix. App is functionally GREEN. Only 3 LOW-priority items remain: (1) SentimentBadge nested <button>, (2) 'Invalid language tag: en-US@posix' Intl error, (3) Portfolio's 'Showing real portfolio data from Angel One ()' banner is shown even when broker is disconnected. None of these block any user flow.
rca_of_the_issue: Iter6's only critical (Postgres process not running) was resolved by main agent adding Postgres + Redis to /etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord_datastores.conf so they auto-restart. Verified via `supervisorctl status` (postgresql RUNNING, redis RUNNING) and 20/20 backend pytest GREEN on the same external URL that returned 502 in iter6. No code change was needed — purely a process-supervision fix.
